title: The #HONORX9dOpenVerseChallenge offers aspiring artists a chance to submit an Unbreakable verse and feature alongside SA Music heavyweights
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Last year, the HONOR X9c...
bodyText:
[{"type":"intro_bold","text":"The search is on for those who can match the unbreakable energy of a new song with a fire verse."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Last year, the HONOR X9c Open Verse Challenge became more than a competition. It was a challenge that became a movement. DJ Maphorisa and DJ Tira and the winning verse got Mzansi swaying, a celebration of artistry and creativity with fresh beats, bars, hooks, harmonies and attitude, all on one sound.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Last year, the HONOR X9c Open Verse Challenge became more than a competition. It was a challenge that became a movement. DJ Maphorisa and DJ Tira and the winning verse got Mzansi swaying, a celebration of artistry and creativity with fresh beats, bars, hooks, harmonies and attitude, all on one sound."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Rumours from the studio, where this year’s future classic is being crafted, point to a level up that can’t be ignored."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thaphelo Khoza took the Verse Challenge crown, walking away with R20,000 cash, an HONOR X9c AI smartphone and an exclusive studio session with DJ Maphorisa and DJ Tira.","html":"Thaphelo Khoza took the Verse Challenge crown, walking away with R20,000 cash, an HONOR X9c AI smartphone and an exclusive studio session with DJ Maphorisa and DJ Tira."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reflecting on the impact, Thapelo ‘Soul taker’ Khoza’ says, “The HONOR X9c Open Verse Challenge really helped because I got to meet the artists I’ve been looking up to, and I have now created a much bigger following for my next moves”.","html":"Reflecting on the impact, Thapelo ‘Soul taker’ Khoza’ says, “The HONOR X9c Open Verse Challenge really helped because I got to meet the artists I’ve been looking up to, and I have now created a much bigger following for my next moves”."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Back by popular demand, HONOR is building on last year’s success by cooking up a bigger creative collaboration that adds to the Amapiano recipe, with a new flavour."},{"type":"heading","text":"A fresh sound and a larger line-up of visionaries","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Just days ago, in Jozi, the studio doors opened for writing and recording sessions that feature a longer line-up, artists that don’t come to play.","html":"Just days ago, in Jozi, the studio doors opened for writing and recording sessions that feature a longer line-up, artists that don’t come to play."},{"type":"image_with_caption","text":"","imageUrl":"https://cms.groupeditors.com//media/1/1///1abcb18f-e2f8-4411-ba5a-3adfbbfd8b37.jpg","caption":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These are the masters at work, forming an unbreakable line-up that features: DJ Tira, Dlala Thukzin, Jazzworx, Thukuthela, Zeh Mageba, Naledi Aphiwe, and CampMasters."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"DJ Tira, Dlala Thukzin & Thukuthela feat Naledi Aphiwe, GL and Zeh McGeba.","html":"DJ Tira, Dlala Thukzin & Thukuthela feat Naledi Aphiwe, GL and Zeh McGeba."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"With a diverse Mzansi-level mix of musical tastes in one room, don’t expect something you can box in."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This mix is on track to hit the country with a fresher feel, a bolder mix ready to be seasoned by that one person who enters the studio ready to win the #HONORX9dOpenVerseChallenge.","html":"This mix is on track to hit the country with a fresher feel, a bolder mix ready to be seasoned by that one person who enters the studio ready to win the #HONORX9dOpenVerseChallenge."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Inspired by the incredible success of the Unbreakable Series, the HONOR X9d is serving up even more of what the country wants, innovation and value to empower those who refuse to settle for less. From the studios to the streets, this is the spirit of innovation that will soon have its own soundtrack.","html":"Inspired by the incredible success of the Unbreakable Series, the HONOR X9d is serving up even more of what the country wants, innovation and value to empower those who refuse to settle for less. From the studios to the streets, this is the spirit of innovation that will soon have its own soundtrack."},{"type":"heading","text":"More Masters Enter the Verse","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With the new track on the verge of release, the attention will soon turn to the person who is about to experience what few dreamers and artists do. The Open Verse Challenge may start in the studio, but its ideas are shaped by Mzansi talent that seizes the moment, ready for the spotlight.","html":"With the new track on the verge of release, the attention will soon turn to the person who is about to experience what few dreamers and artists do. The Open Verse Challenge may start in the studio, but its ideas are shaped by Mzansi talent that seizes the moment, ready for the spotlight."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Powered by next-level thinking, the HONOR X9d is built for creators who refuse to go slow, who create fast, and live loud. DJ Maphorisa said it best last year:","html":"Powered by next-level thinking, the HONOR X9d is built for creators who refuse to go slow, who create fast, and live loud. DJ Maphorisa said it best last year:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Whether you’re vibing in the studio or capturing spontaneous moments, the HONOR X9c is your ultimate sidekick.” This year, the HONOR X9d takes that creator-ready spirit and levels it up for every moment of magic.","html":"“Whether you’re vibing in the studio or capturing spontaneous moments, the HONOR X9c is your ultimate sidekick.” This year, the HONOR X9d takes that creator-ready spirit and levels it up for every moment of magic."},{"type":"heading","text":"How to enter and key dates","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Entries open on 3 February and close on 25 February, with the winner announced on 27 February. Enter with presence via TikTok, with Instagram in the mix for updates and highlights.","html":"Entries open on 3 February and close on 25 February, with the winner announced on 27 February. Enter with presence via TikTok, with Instagram in the mix for updates and highlights."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Follow HONOR’s official TikTok: @honorzaUse the hashtag: #HONORX9dOpenVerseChallengeRecord your verse, bring your flavourPost it and tag #HONORX9dOpenVerseChallenge","html":"
  • Follow HONOR’s official TikTok: @honorza
  • Use the hashtag: #HONORX9dOpenVerseChallenge
  • Record your verse, bring your flavour
  • Post it and tag #HONORX9dOpenVerseChallenge
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One winner and their fire verse will walk away with the R20,000 cash, the HONOR X9d, as well as a studio session with Jazzworx and Thukuthela, alongside Dlala Thukzin and Naledi Aphiwe. For now, the track is loading, and the track is heating up.","html":"One winner and their fire verse will walk away with the R20,000 cash, the HONOR X9d, as well as a studio session with Jazzworx and Thukuthela, alongside Dlala Thukzin and Naledi Aphiwe. For now, the track is loading, and the track is heating up."}]

author: Supplied
teaser: The search is on for those who can match the unbreakable energy of a new song with a fire verse.
featuredCaption: Powered by next-level thinking, the HONOR X9d is built for creators who refuse to go slow, who create fast, and live loud.
